channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania's Inflation Reaches 4% in April 2026 Driven by Fuel, Transport, and Food Prices
item.description: In April 2026, Tanzania experienced a noticeable rise in inflation, with the annual headline rate reaching 4.0%, up from 3.2% in March. This increase was mainly influenced by steep price hikes in tran...

item.title: Experts stress need for credible and adaptive deterrence against India
item.description: ISLAMABAD – Strategic experts have underlined the growing fragility of regional security and the importance of keeping Pakistan's deterrence both credible and adaptive in response to India’s increasin...

item.title: Lafarge Africa trains women in construction skills to boost economic independence
item.description: Lafarge Africa dey really dey change di game for women wey wan enter construction sector. Through their BuildHer initiative, dem don train 100 women from Lagos, Ogun, and Cross River states for tiling...

item.title: CUE Opens Recruitment for Over 40 Positions to Support University Quality Standards
item.description: Kenya's Commission for University Education (CUE) has officially opened applications for over 40 job positions, targeting qualified Kenyan professionals. The advertised roles include both permanent, p...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Guidance for May 12, 2026
item.description: Sally Brompton provides daily horoscope guidance for May 12, 2026, offering insight and advice for each zodiac sign. For those celebrating a birthday today, she recommends listening to your inner voic...

item.title: Review: Omoda C7 SHS plug-in hybrid offers strong efficiency and features
item.description: The Omoda C7 SHS, a plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV), brings fresh appeal to South African motorists amid rising fuel price concerns linked to geopolitical tensions. Priced at R689,900, it sits ...

item.title: Christine Keeler: Iconic Photos and Her Role in the 1963 Profumo Affair
item.description: Christine Keeler (1942–2017) was a British model and showgirl who became one of the most talked-about figures of the 1960s due to her central involvement in the Profumo Affair. The scandal erupted in ...

item.title: How a Canberra Couple Perfected Northern Vietnamese Pho and Traditional Dishes
item.description: Nestled on a quiet street in Phillip, Canberra, +84 Kitchen is redefining Vietnamese cuisine in Australia. Co-owners Quynh Anh Do and Nam Tran, a husband-and-wife duo, have crafted a signature beef ph...

item.title: Himanta Sarma's Political Career in Assam: From Congress to BJP Leadership
item.description: Himanta Biswa Sarma has had a remarkable political journey in Assam, transitioning from a trusted face of the Congress party to a key strategist and leader in the BJP. His career highlights the changi...

item.title: A Visual Journey Through 1920s Women’s Hairstyles
item.description: The 1920s was a transformative decade for women’s fashion, and hairstyles became a powerful form of self-expression and liberation. This article highlights 30 vintage scrapbook portraits that capture ...

item.title: Hertha Thiele: Life and Career of a Pioneering German Actress
item.description: Hertha Thiele (1908–1984) was a celebrated German actress whose career spanned from the Weimar Republic to East Germany (GDR). She rose to international fame with her lead role in the 1931 film 'Mädch...

item.title: WSJ Critiques Trump’s Proposed Measures to Address Rising Living Costs

item.title: Role of Customs in Securing Trade and Society Across Africa

item.title: Estimated Fuel Prices in Metro Manila for May 12: Diesel Rolls Back, Gasoline Rises
item.description: On May 12, 2026, fuel prices in Metro Manila show mixed movements as diesel and premium diesel experience a significant rollback of P9.57 per liter, while gasoline products—Unleaded 91, Premium 95, an...

item.title: Prime Minister Urges Citizens to Reduce Consumption Amid Economic Pressures
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has recently issued a seven-point appeal to Indian citizens, urging them to adopt austerity measures, such as working from home and reducing fuel consumption. The appeal s...

item.title: NDC Gains Momentum as Potential Third Force Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: As Nigeria dey ginger for 2027 elections, new political party, the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), dey show say e fit become serious contender for opposition space. The party don attract heavyweigh...

item.title: Filming of A Different World Sequel Completed in Atlanta with Original Cast Returning
item.description: The Netflix sequel to the beloved 1987-1993 sitcom A Different World has wrapped filming for its first season in Atlanta. The series will follow Dwayne and Whitley’s youngest child, Deborah, as she be...

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak on MV Hondius: passengers quarantined after confirmed infections
item.description: At least six confirmed cases of hantavirus have been reported among passengers of the MV Hondius following a deadly outbreak, according to the World Health Organisation. The last passengers disembarke...

item.title: Government Moves to Implement Long-Delayed Oil Refining Policy Amid Regional Supply Concerns
item.description: ISLAMABAD – Pakistan’s government has decided to revive its petroleum refining policy, which was finalised in 2023 but remained largely unimplemented due to complications with the IMF. The ongoing US-...

item.title: Trump rejects Iran’s peace offer amid escalating drone strikes in the Gulf
item.description: US President Donald Trump has formally rejected Iran's response to a peace proposal, labelling it 'totally unacceptable', amid renewed tensions in the Gulf region. Iran had responded to the latest US ...
